schemes.benefit_en: Up to Rs 5 lakh/year free surgical treatment at government and private hospitals
schemes.eligibility: TN families with annual income < Rs 72,000/year

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 25 lakh/year health insurance for every family in Rajasthan
schemes.benefit_hi: राजस्थान के प्रत्येक परिवार को ₹25 लाख/वर्ष स्वास्थ्य बीमा
schemes.eligibility: All Rajasthan residents (BPL: free; others: Rs 850/year premium)

schemes.benefit_en: Free/subsidized treatment in government hospitals across Karnataka
schemes.benefit_hi: कर्नाटक के सरकारी अस्पतालों में मुफ्त/रियायती इलाज
schemes.eligibility: Karnataka residents (BPL: fully free, APL: subsidized)

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5 lakh/year health insurance for families with income < Rs 1.8 lakh
schemes.benefit_hi: ₹1.8 लाख से कम आय वाले परिवारों को ₹5 लाख/वर्ष बीमा
schemes.eligibility: Haryana families with annual income < Rs 1.8 lakh

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5 lakh/year health insurance for HP residents not covered under PMJAY
schemes.benefit_hi: PMJAY से बाहर HP निवासियों को ₹5 लाख/वर्ष स्वास्थ्य बीमा
schemes.eligibility: HP residents not eligible for PMJAY, premium Rs 365-1000/year by category

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 3,000/month for home-based care of serious illness patients
schemes.benefit_hi: गंभीर बीमारी के घरेलू देखभाल के लिए ₹3,000/माह
schemes.eligibility: HP patients with cancer, paralysis, muscular dystrophy etc.

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 2 lakh/year free treatment for 5 disease categories
schemes.benefit_hi: 5 रोग श्रेणियों के लिए ₹2 लाख/वर्ष मुफ्त इलाज
schemes.eligibility: Assam families (BPL: free, APL: income < Rs 5 lakh)

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5 lakh (women: Rs 10 lakh)/year free health cover for BPL families
schemes.benefit_hi: BPL परिवारों को ₹5 लाख (महिला: ₹10 लाख)/वर्ष मुफ्त इलाज

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5 lakh/year cashless health coverage for all WB families
schemes.benefit_hi: पश्चिम बंगाल के सभी परिवारों को ₹5 लाख/वर्ष स्वास्थ्य बीमा
schemes.eligibility: All West Bengal families (smart card issued)

schemes.name_en: Mahatma Jyotirao Phule Jan Arogya Yojana
schemes.name_hi: महात्मा ज्योतिराव फुले जन आरोग्य योजना
schemes.benefit_en: Health insurance up to Rs 1.5 lakh/year (Rs 2.5 lakh for special diseases)
schemes.benefit_hi: ₹1.5 लाख/वर्ष स्वास्थ्य बीमा (विशेष बीमारियों में ₹2.5 लाख)
schemes.eligibility: Yellow/Orange/White ration card holders in Maharashtra

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5 lakh/year cashless treatment for poor families at 460+ hospitals
schemes.eligibility: Telangana BPL families with white ration card

schemes.name_hi: ਆਮ ਆਦਮੀ ਕਲੀਨਿਕ / आम आदमी क्लीनिक
schemes.benefit_en: Free OPD, 43 tests and 80+ medicines at neighborhood clinics
schemes.benefit_hi: नजदीकी क्लीनिक में मुफ्त OPD, 43 जांच और 80+ दवाइयाँ

schemes.benefit_en: Cashless health treatment up to Rs 5 lakh for serious diseases
schemes.benefit_hi: गंभीर बीमारियों के लिए ₹5 लाख तक कैशलेस इलाज
schemes.eligibility: Gujarat BPL families and lower-middle income groups

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5 lakh/year health cover + additional Rs 10 lakh for critical illnesses
schemes.benefit_hi: ₹5 लाख/वर्ष स्वास्थ्य बीमा + गंभीर बीमारियों में ₹10 लाख
schemes.eligibility: All AP families with white/yellow ration card

schemes.benefit_en: Financial assistance up to Rs 2 lakh for cancer and major illness treatment
schemes.benefit_hi: कैंसर और गंभीर बीमारियों के इलाज में ₹2 लाख तक सहायता
schemes.eligibility: Kerala BPL/APL families with income < Rs 1 lakh/year
